country_result:
Country: Dominican Republic
Coordinates: 18.4861, -69.9312
Reasoning: The evidence strongly points to the Dominican Republic, specifically the linguistic evidence regarding the "IMPACTO AMBIENTAL CATEGORIA 1" phrasing and the resolution format (313-2020), which are characteristic of the Dominican Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. This is further supported by the specific tapered concrete utility poles, the white metal perimeter fencing, and the tropical landscape featuring Mango trees, all of which are highly typical of the Dominican Republic and distinguish it from Puerto Rico or other Spanish-speaking countries.
